uplink.description: Full sensor block + battery (synthetic, in-bounds): pressure 0.5 bar, electronics 24 degC, PT1000 18.5 degC, EC 1.5 mS/cm, battery 3.115 V
uplink._note: Oracle: words chosen so upstream reference/upstream-codec.js yields pressure=0.5 bar, temperature_electronics=24, temperature_pt1000=18.5, electrical_conductivity=1.5 mS/cm, battery_voltage=3.115 V. Canonical conversion: pressure bar x100 -> 50 kPa; PT1000 degC -> water.temperature.current; EC mS/cm x1000 -> 1500 uS/cm; electronics temp -> camelCase extra; battery V as-is.

Input from upstream example. Oracle: upstream yields pressure=0.0008544921875 bar, electronics=23.5234375, pt1000=23.50390625, EC=0.005859375 mS/cm, battery=3.115 V. Canonical: pressure x100 -> 0.08544921875 kPa (round 4dp = 0.0854); pt1000 -> 23.5039; EC x1000 -> 5.859375 uS/cm (round 4dp = 5.8594); electronics extra = 23.5234; battery 3.115.
Oracle: upstream yields only battery_voltage=3.115 V when only the battery flag bit is set. No water-column fields present.

uplink.description: Wrong protocol version byte (v1) is rejected
uplink._note: Oracle: upstream returns {error: "protocol version 1 doesn't match v2"}; our codec surfaces the same string in errors[].
